behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: This can fail at the boundary between diff parsing and prompt/input assembly across modules. A unit test on a single formatter can pass while wiring still leaks unchanged lines. Real network/API is not strictly required if realistic diff fixtures are used.
behaviors.test_description: Run the review-input builder against representative unified diffs (including multi-hunk files and context lines) and assert the emitted review payload contains only added/modified line ranges and excludes untouched file regions.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: Git hosting APIs enforce nontrivial diff-position semantics (line, side, commit SHA, outdated hunks). In-process mocks can accept invalid mappings that the real API rejects or misplaces.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments computed by the automation, then fetch PR review comments from the platform API and verify each comment appears on the intended changed line/hunk in the actual diff.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Pass/fail depends on model judgment quality, not only deterministic wiring. Mocking model output would hide the core failure (missing the real bug). Outcomes may vary run-to-run.
behaviors.test_description: Use a seeded corpus PR containing a known bug in changed lines, run the real model-based review, and assert at least one inline finding correctly points to that bug category/location within an acceptance window over repeated runs.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to an inline comment that was also posted — no findings appear in the summary without a matching inline comment.
behaviors.justification: Real failures include partial post errors/rate limits/retries where summary and inline state diverge. Mocks often make both writes succeed and can hide this mismatch.
behaviors.test_description: On a real PR, execute review posting, then read back posted inline comments and the final summary comment via API; parse finding identifiers and assert a 1:1 mapping from every summary item to an existing inline comment.

behaviors.description: The full sequence — reading the diff, posting inline comments, posting the summary comment — completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This is an end-to-end agent pipeline objective spanning retrieval, agentic analysis, and multiple write actions with ordering/dependency. The real failure boundary is the full orchestrated run, not a single call.
behaviors.test_description: Trigger the automation on a real test PR and verify unattended completion: diff fetched, model-generated findings produced, inline comments posted, and summary posted with consistent references and terminal success status/logs.
